title: Cephalophyllum rangei
taxonomy: Cephalophyllum rangei is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Cephalophyllum, which is a group of succulent plants native to South Africa. The classification of Cephalophyllum rangei places it within the order Caryophyllales, which includes various succulent and flowering plants. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae, which includes all types of plants. Overall, Cephalophyllum rangei's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
